subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket and dark jeans, stepping off the curb to cross the urban street before the underpass directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small backpack, wears sneakers; the red jacket vivid against the grey concrete and the amber underpass glow beyond
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket, dark jeans, sneakers, small backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.facial_features: Round face, dark short hair, small features

subjects.description: A few parked cars along the curbs of the urban residential street near the underpass
subjects.appearance_details: Sedans and compact SUVs in muted city colors, their panels dull under the grey overcast, warm sodium light touching those nearer the underpass
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: An urban residential street approaching a highway underpass in a North American city on a dim, overcast morning. Brick apartment blocks and row houses line a two-lane road of dry concrete that runs toward the mouth of the underpass, where sodium-orange lamps glow warmly in the shadowed passage. A few parked cars line the curbs; sidewalks run beside the homes toward the underpass. The flat grey overcast gives way to the amber cast of the tunnel lamps ahead, over the faded center markings on the pale concrete.

lighting.conditions: Dim overcast morning transitioning to sodium-orange tunnel light
lighting.direction: Flat grey skylight over the open street, warm sodium lamps glowing from within the underpass ahead
lighting.shadows: Faint, soft shadows outdoors deepening to warm-edged shadow under the underpass
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool grey daylight blending into an amber sodium glow toward the underpass mouth; the child's red jacket stands out against both the grey and the orange cast

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool grey overcast and pale concrete outside, warm sodium-orange glow inside the underpass, brick apartment tones, and a vivid red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Muted, grey urban-morning calm near the underpass broken by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating brick blocks and parked cars, the framing arch of the underpass, sodium lamp glow ahead

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road and crossing child; the amber-lit underpass interior glows softly beyond

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the urban residential street toward the underpass on an overcast morning.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path before the underpass.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the dry concrete, decelerating as the nose dips slightly.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the dry concrete, partially faded, cool-grey in the daylight and faintly amber-tinted toward the underpass
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward down the urban residential street toward the underpass, brick blocks and parked cars along the concrete road with the sodium glow ahead.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the sidewalk into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly before the underpass.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely before the amber-lit underpass.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward down an urban residential street toward a highway underpass on a dim overcast morning, sodium lamps glowing amber in the passage ahead past parked cars. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking on the dry concrete, slowing with a slight forward pitch. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary before the underpass while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Muted urban-morning sounds of distant traffic echoing near the underpass, the hum of the vehicle over dry concrete, then firm tire and brake friction as it decelerates, settling into an idle with a faint underpass echo.
